title: ProvenanceReport
description: Per-field provenance from verify_extraction(). Grounded in src/contracts.py ProvenanceReport TypedDict and src/verifier.py _default_provenance() runtime output.

VendorProvenance.description: Vendor field provenance. Always has grounded + evidence_found_at.

AmountProvenance.description: Amount field provenance. grounded + parsed_evidence + delta always present from _default_provenance(). evidence_found_at added dynamically by _verify_amount().

parsed_evidence.description: Parsed numeric value from evidence text, or null if not yet parsed.

delta.description: Absolute difference between claimed value and parsed evidence, or null.

evidence_found_at.description: Character offset where evidence was found. Added dynamically; not present in _default_provenance().

po_pattern_found.description: Whether a PO pattern was found in evidence, or null if not checked.

InvoiceDateProvenance.description: invoice_date field provenance. Present only when invoice_date validator runs.

normalized_evidence.description: Normalized evidence date string, or null.

TaxAmountProvenance.description: tax_amount field provenance. Present only when tax_amount validator runs.

anchor_found.description: Whether a tax-related anchor keyword was found.
